cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Anthony could have gone to the bookstore. First, the problem says that Anthony went to the bookstore today, and we need to find between what times that could have happened. The options are given, but I need to analyze the information provided to determine the correct one. Let me list out the key points: 1. Anthony woke up at 7am. 2. David saw Anthony working at the office from 7am to 8am. 3. Leslie saw Anthony getting a coffee at the cafe from 8am to 11am. 4. Sarah saw Anthony watching a movie at the theater from 1pm to 9pm. 5. The bookstore was closed after 9pm. So, the goal is to find a time window when Anthony wasn't doing any of these other activities and the bookstore was still open. Let me break down Anthony's schedule based on the information: - 7:00am to 8:00am: Working at the office (David saw him) - 8:00am to 11:00am: Getting coffee at the cafe (Leslie saw him) - 1:00pm to 9:00pm: Watching a movie at the theater (Sarah saw him) Additionally, Anthony woke up at 7am, which probably means he wasn't doing anything before that, but since the earliest activity mentioned is 7am, we don't have info about before that for sure. The bookstore was closed after 9pm, so Anthony couldn't have gone there after that. Now let's look at the time gaps between these activities: - From waking up at 7am to 8am: working at the office - From 8am to 11am: getting coffee at the cafe - From 11am to 1pm: there's no information about Anthony's whereabouts - From 1pm to 9pm: watching a movie at the theater So the only time window when we don't know where Anthony was is between 11am and 1pm. During this time, he could have gone to the bookstore, assuming it was open. The problem doesn't say when the bookstore opens, only that it was closed after 9pm. So we can assume it was open during the day, at least during the 11am to 1pm window. Let me check the options: (A) 11am to 1pm - This is the time window when we don't know where Anthony was, so he could have gone to the bookstore during this time. (B) 8am to 11am - We know he was getting coffee during this time, so he couldn't have been at the bookstore. (C) 7am to 8am
